The '''Sarrish Defense Force''' was the primary military body on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sarrish/Legends|Sarrish]] as of the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. [[Veedaaz Awmetth/Legends|Veedaaz Awmetth]] was a member of the Defense Force before representing his planet in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]].
